THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, EUGENE HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVENSON, FRED $1,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,600.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR.
